---
layout: default
title: "Neural Access Method‚ĄĘ"
---

# Neural Access Method‚ĄĘ

**Paper in preparation.**

---

## What It Is

Neural Access Method‚ĄĘ is the intervention protocol layer of the Adapted Architecture stack. It describes the specific techniques and processes used to access and shift an adaptive system's architecture.

---

## Relationship to Other Methods

```
Adapted Architecture   ‚Üź outcome frame
        ‚ÜĎ
Neuroformation‚ĄĘ        ‚Üź methodology
        ‚ÜĎ
Elevation Grid‚ĄĘ        ‚Üź diagnostic
        ‚ÜĎ
Neural Access Method‚ĄĘ  ‚Üź this intervention
```

---

## Protected Status

Neural Access Method‚ĄĘ is a protected methodology mark of Aaron M. Slusher.

---

*Aaron M. Slusher ¬∑ ORCID 0009-0000-9923-3207*
